moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: Spain and Argentina will battle it out in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final tomorrow at MetLife Stadium in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Who's taking home the biggest trophy in football tomorrow? It's Spain vs. Argentina in the FIFA World Cup Final! #WorldCupFinal

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: After England's brave semi-final run, the World Cup culminates tomorrow. Will it be Spain or Argentina lifting the cup?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the top spot with 'Rein Me In' for a 17th non-consecutive week, while World Cup anthems 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' surge up the chart.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' reigns supreme for a huge 17th week on the Official Singles Chart.

angles.name: World Cup Effect
angles.copy: Football fever hits the charts! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' is at #2 and 'Three Lions' by Baddiel, Skinner & Lightning Seed charges to #3 after the World Cup excitement.

angles.name: New Entry Olivia
angles.copy: New music alert! Olivia Rodrigo's 'honeybee' buzzes into the Top 40 at #30 this week.

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: World-class athletes are competing in a full programme of track and field events today at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Live Athletics
angles.copy: It's a big day for athletics in the capital! The London Athletics Meet is underway at the London Stadium with global stars competing.

angles.name: Track and Field
angles.copy: Catch all the track and field action today at the London Athletics Meet! Who are you cheering for?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, kicks off today at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring five stages of music.

angles.name: Festival Kicks Off
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is HERE! Nottingham is buzzing as music takes over Wollaton Hall today and tomorrow.

angles.name: Nottingham's Biggest
angles.copy: Five stages, all genres! Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest, is bringing the party to Wollaton Hall this weekend.

moments.title: Big Love Festival South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a four-day independent music and arts festival, continues today and concludes tomorrow in the Welsh countryside near Usk.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Vibes
angles.copy: It's the final weekend of Big Love Festival! Immerse yourself in music, arts, and community in the beautiful Welsh countryside near Usk.

angles.name: South Wales Party
angles.copy: Celebrating its 10th year, Big Love Festival is bringing the best small festival vibes to South Wales this weekend. Don't miss out!

moments.title: Andy Burnham to become UK Prime Minister
moments.blurb: Andy Burnham was appointed Labour party leader yesterday and will replace Keir Starmer as the UK Prime Minister on Monday.

angles.name: New PM Incoming
angles.copy: A new era for UK politics! Andy Burnham is set to become Prime Minister on Monday. Big changes ahead.

angles.name: Monday in Number 10
angles.copy: From Mayor of Greater Manchester to Prime Minister – Andy Burnham takes the keys to Number 10 Downing Street on Monday.

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games begin on July 23, with over 3,000 athletes competing across an 11-day schedule.

angles.name: Countdown to Games
angles.copy: Just 5 days to go until the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games! Get ready for 11 days of incredible sport.

angles.name: Scotland Hosts
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games starting July 23! Who's excited for the action?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Suffolk
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival is Back
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Henham Park in Suffolk will be buzzing with music, comedy, and arts from July 23-26.

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Happy 20th anniversary, Latitude! Join the celebrations at Henham Park next week for a weekend of discovery.

moments.title: Together Again Festival Cheshire
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival takes place at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24-26, featuring a mix of tech house, disco, bass, and classic anthems.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Get ready for Together Again Festival! Bolesworth Castle, Cheshire, hosts three days of music, arts, and culture from July 24-26.

angles.name: Dance & Rewind
angles.copy: From tech house to classic pop and UK garage – Together Again Festival has it all next weekend in Cheshire!

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.!
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam), known for hits like 'Paper Planes', turns 51 today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the iconic M.I.A.! Still 'Paper Planes' flying high.

angles.name: Music Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating the groundbreaking artist M.I.A. on her 51st birthday today! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Daron Malakian
moments.blurb: Daron Malakian, guitarist and vocalist for System Of A Down, celebrates his 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to System Of A Down's Daron Malakian! Rock on!

angles.name: SOAD Guitarist
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Daron Malakian on his 51st birthday today. What's your favourite System Of A Down song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack Irons
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer Jack Irons, known for his work with Pearl Jam and Red Hot Chili Peppers, turns 64 today.

angles.name: Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 64th Birthday to the phenomenal Jack Irons! A true drumming legend of Pearl Jam and RHCP.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack Irons' 64th birthday today! His rhythm has shaped so many iconic tracks.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Martha Reeves
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday today.

angles.name: Motown Queen
angles.copy: Dancing in the street and celebrating! Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves, Motown icon.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary Martha Reeves of Martha and the Vandellas!

moments.title: Remembering Keith Levene
moments.blurb: Today would have been the 69th birthday of Keith Levene, the innovative guitarist and founding member of The Clash and Public Image Ltd, who passed away in 2022.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the influential guitarist Keith Levene, co-founder of The Clash & Public Image Ltd, who would have been 69 today. His legacy lives on.

angles.name: Post-Punk Pioneer
angles.copy: Today we pay tribute to Keith Levene, whose innovative guitar work shaped post-punk. He would have celebrated his 69th birthday.

moments.title: Government Launches 'Turn It Up: Our Plan for Music'
moments.blurb: The UK Government has announced a new long-term strategy, 'Turn It Up: Our Plan for Music', backed by £45 million investment to support the music industry.

angles.name: Music Industry Boost
angles.copy: Big news for UK music! The government's 'Turn It Up: Our Plan for Music' is investing £45m to back artists and businesses.

angles.name: Future of Music
angles.copy: From grassroots projects to global talent, the UK's new Plan for Music aims to secure a thriving industry for generations to come.

moments.title: Scotland's First Rock 'n' Roll Hall of Fame Announced
moments.blurb: Glasgow is set to get ScotsRock, Scotland's first dedicated Rock 'n' Roll Hall of Fame, taking over the former CCA on Sauchiehall Street, with plans to open in July 2028.

angles.name: Scottish Rock History
angles.copy: Rock 'n' roll history is coming to Glasgow! ScotsRock, Scotland's first dedicated Hall of Fame, has been announced.

angles.name: Glasgow Music Hub
angles.copy: Exciting news for Scottish music fans! Glasgow will soon be home to ScotsRock, celebrating the country's huge contribution to rock.
